description: Seed podcasts for Funnel B - External guest extraction
instructions: Add 5-10 psychedelic-focused podcasts. These will be used to extract guests, then find where those guests have appeared on other podcasts.

seed_podcasts.name: Psychedelics Today
seed_podcasts.notes: Primary seed podcast - major player in psychedelic space
Add podcast name, Spotify Show ID, and notes

how_to_find_spotify_show_id: 1. Search for podcast on Spotify, 2. Click 'Share' → 'Copy Show Link', 3. Extract ID from URL: https://open.spotify.com/show/{SHOW_ID}
recommended_podcasts_to_consider: The Tim Ferriss Show (has psychedelic episodes)
